title: World Cup contenders: Can Deschamps convert France’s talent into glory?
original_text:
Departing coach Didier Deschamps looks to win second title with side led by superstar forwards Kylian Mbappe and Ousmane Dembele.

The FIFA World Cup begins on June 11. You can follow the action on Al Jazeera’s dedicated World Cup 2026 page with all the latest news, match build-up and live text commentary, and
